##NAMES=Vivianite
##RRUFFID=R070331
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Fe^2+^_3_(PO_4_)_2_·8H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Big Fish River, Yukon Territory, Canada
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Mark Mauthner
##DESCRIPTION=Platy, indigo-blue massive, associated with maricite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R070331
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Fe^2+^_1.77_Mg_1.21_Mn_0.02_)(P_1.00_O_4_)_2_·8H_2_O ; (dark phase, H_2_O is estimated by difference) : Na_1.00_Fe^2+^_1.00_P_1.00_O_4_ (light phase = maricite, with trace amounts of Mn)
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 10.0993 b: 13.444 c: 4.6765 alpha: 90 beta: 104.916 gamma: 90 volume: 613.56 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
